name: about-page
description: Write compelling About page copy for a company or personal brand that builds trust, communicates values, and converts visitors into leads.
input_description: Company or person name, mission, founding story or background, core values, team highlights, and desired reader action.
output_description: Full About page in Markdown with hero statement, origin story, mission/values section, team or founder spotlight, social proof indicators, and a CTA.
